options.content:
## Cost Estimation & Attribution

Estimate LLM spending based on token usage and reference pricing. Track cost trends across models and providers for capacity planning and cost optimization.

### OpenAI
| Model | Input | Output |
|-------|-------|--------|
| GPT-4o | $${openai_4o_in} | $${openai_4o_out} |
| GPT-4o-mini | $${openai_mini_in} | $${openai_mini_out} |
| o1 | $${openai_o1_in} | $${openai_o1_out} |

### Anthropic
| Model | Input | Output |
|-------|-------|--------|
| Claude Opus | $${claude_opus_in} | $${claude_opus_out} |
| Claude Sonnet | $${claude_sonnet_in} | $${claude_sonnet_out} |
| Claude Haiku | $${claude_haiku_in} | $${claude_haiku_out} |

### Google
| Model | Input | Output |
|-------|-------|--------|
| Gemini Pro | $${gemini_pro_in} | $${gemini_pro_out} |
| Gemini Flash | $${gemini_flash_in} | $${gemini_flash_out} |

### AWS Nova
| Model | Input | Output |
|-------|-------|--------|
| Nova Micro | $${nova_micro_in} | $${nova_micro_out} |
| Nova Lite | $${nova_lite_in} | $${nova_lite_out} |
| Nova Pro | $${nova_pro_in} | $${nova_pro_out} |

panels.title: Reference Pricing ($ per 1M tokens) - Used for Cost Estimation

options.content: 24-hour summary of token consumption and request volumes for cost tracking and capacity planning.

panels.description: Combined input and output tokens processed in the last 24 hours.
panels.title: Total Tokens (24h)

panels.description: Tokens sent to LLM providers (prompts, context) in the last 24 hours.
panels.title: Input Tokens (24h)

panels.description: Tokens received from LLM providers (responses) in the last 24 hours.
panels.title: Output Tokens (24h)

panels.description: Total API calls made to LLM providers in the last 24 hours.
panels.title: Total Requests (24h)

panels.description: Current cost rate based on token throughput and model pricing.
panels.title: Cost Rate ($/hour)

targets.expr:
(
  (sum(rate(agentgateway_gen_ai_client_token_usage_sum{namespace=~"$namespace", gen_ai_token_type="input", gen_ai_request_model=~"gpt-4o"}[$__rate_interval])) or vector(0)) * $openai_4o_in +
  (sum(rate(agentgateway_gen_ai_client_token_usage_sum{namespace=~"$namespace", gen_ai_token_type="output", gen_ai_request_model=~"gpt-4o"}[$__rate_interval])) or vector(0)) * $openai_4o_out +
  (sum(rate(agentgateway_gen_ai_client_token_usage_sum{namespace=~"$namespace", gen_ai_token_type="input", gen_ai_request_model=~"gpt-4o-mini"}[$__rate_interval])) or vector(0)) * $openai_mini_in +
  (sum(rate(agentgateway_gen_ai_client_token_usage_sum{namespace=~"$namespace", gen_ai_token_type="output", gen_ai_request_model=~"gpt-4o-mini"}[$__rate_interval])) or vector(0)) * $openai_mini_out +
  (sum(rate(agentgateway_gen_ai_client_token_usage_sum{namespace=~"$namespace", gen_ai_token_type="input", gen_ai_request_model=~"o1.*"}[$__rate_interval])) or vector(0)) * $openai_o1_in +
  (sum(rate(agentgateway_gen_ai_client_token_usage_sum{namespace=~"$namespace", gen_ai_token_type="output", gen_ai_request_model=~"o1.*"}[$__rate_interval])) or vector(0)) * $openai_o1_out +
  (sum(rate(agentgateway_gen_ai_client_token_usage_sum{namespace=~"$namespace", gen_ai_token_type="input", gen_ai_request_model=~"claude.*opus.*"}[$__rate_interval])) or vector(0)) * $claude_opus_in +
  (sum(rate(agentgateway_gen_ai_client_token_usage_sum{namespace=~"$namespace", gen_ai_token_type="output", gen_ai_request_model=~"claude.*opus.*"}[$__rate_interval])) or vector(0)) * $claude_opus_out +
  (sum(rate(agentgateway_gen_ai_client_token_usage_sum{namespace=~"$namespace", gen_ai_token_type="input", gen_ai_request_model=~"claude.*sonnet.*"}[$__rate_interval])) or vector(0)) * $claude_sonnet_in +
  (sum(rate(agentgateway_gen_ai_client_token_usage_sum{namespace=~"$namespace", gen_ai_token_type="output", gen_ai_request_model=~"claude.*sonnet.*"}[$__rate_interval])) or vector(0)) * $claude_sonnet_out +
  (sum(rate(agentgateway_gen_ai_client_token_usage_sum{namespace=~"$namespace", gen_ai_token_type="input", gen_ai_request_model=~"claude.*haiku.*"}[$__rate_interval])) or vector(0)) * $claude_haiku_in +
  (sum(rate(agentgateway_gen_ai_client_token_usage_sum{namespace=~"$namespace", gen_ai_token_type="output", gen_ai_request_model=~"claude.*haiku.*"}[$__rate_interval])) or vector(0)) * $claude_haiku_out +
  (sum(rate(agentgateway_gen_ai_client_token_usage_sum{namespace=~"$namespace", gen_ai_token_type="input", gen_ai_request_model=~"gemini.*pro.*"}[$__rate_interval])) or vector(0)) * $gemini_pro_in +
  (sum(rate(agentgateway_gen_ai_client_token_usage_sum{namespace=~"$namespace", gen_ai_token_type="output", gen_ai_request_model=~"gemini.*pro.*"}[$__rate_interval])) or vector(0)) * $gemini_pro_out +
  (sum(rate(agentgateway_gen_ai_client_token_usage_sum{namespace=~"$namespace", gen_ai_token_type="input", gen_ai_request_model=~"gemini.*flash.*"}[$__rate_interval])) or vector(0)) * $gemini_flash_in +
  (sum(rate(agentgateway_gen_ai_client_token_usage_sum{namespace=~"$namespace", gen_ai_token_type="output", gen_ai_request_model=~"gemini.*flash.*"}[$__rate_interval])) or vector(0)) * $gemini_flash_out
) / 1000000 * 3600

panels.description: Estimated total cost for the last 24 hours based on reference pricing.
panels.title: Cost (Last 24h)

targets.expr:
(
  (sum(increase(agentgateway_gen_ai_client_token_usage_sum{namespace=~"$namespace", gen_ai_token_type="input", gen_ai_request_model=~"gpt-4o"}[24h])) or vector(0)) * $openai_4o_in +
  (sum(increase(agentgateway_gen_ai_client_token_usage_sum{namespace=~"$namespace", gen_ai_token_type="output", gen_ai_request_model=~"gpt-4o"}[24h])) or vector(0)) * $openai_4o_out +
  (sum(increase(agentgateway_gen_ai_client_token_usage_sum{namespace=~"$namespace", gen_ai_token_type="input", gen_ai_request_model=~"gpt-4o-mini"}[24h])) or vector(0)) * $openai_mini_in +
  (sum(increase(agentgateway_gen_ai_client_token_usage_sum{namespace=~"$namespace", gen_ai_token_type="output", gen_ai_request_model=~"gpt-4o-mini"}[24h])) or vector(0)) * $openai_mini_out +
  (sum(increase(agentgateway_gen_ai_client_token_usage_sum{namespace=~"$namespace", gen_ai_token_type="input", gen_ai_request_model=~"o1.*"}[24h])) or vector(0)) * $openai_o1_in +
  (sum(increase(agentgateway_gen_ai_client_token_usage_sum{namespace=~"$namespace", gen_ai_token_type="output", gen_ai_request_model=~"o1.*"}[24h])) or vector(0)) * $openai_o1_out +
  (sum(increase(agentgateway_gen_ai_client_token_usage_sum{namespace=~"$namespace", gen_ai_token_type="input", gen_ai_request_model=~"claude.*opus.*"}[24h])) or vector(0)) * $claude_opus_in +
  (sum(increase(agentgateway_gen_ai_client_token_usage_sum{namespace=~"$namespace", gen_ai_token_type="output", gen_ai_request_model=~"claude.*opus.*"}[24h])) or vector(0)) * $claude_opus_out +
  (sum(increase(agentgateway_gen_ai_client_token_usage_sum{namespace=~"$namespace", gen_ai_token_type="input", gen_ai_request_model=~"claude.*sonnet.*"}[24h])) or vector(0)) * $claude_sonnet_in +
  (sum(increase(agentgateway_gen_ai_client_token_usage_sum{namespace=~"$namespace", gen_ai_token_type="output", gen_ai_request_model=~"claude.*sonnet.*"}[24h])) or vector(0)) * $claude_sonnet_out +
  (sum(increase(agentgateway_gen_ai_client_token_usage_sum{namespace=~"$namespace", gen_ai_token_type="input", gen_ai_request_model=~"claude.*haiku.*"}[24h])) or vector(0)) * $claude_haiku_in +
  (sum(increase(agentgateway_gen_ai_client_token_usage_sum{namespace=~"$namespace", gen_ai_token_type="output", gen_ai_request_model=~"claude.*haiku.*"}[24h])) or vector(0)) * $claude_haiku_out +
  (sum(increase(agentgateway_gen_ai_client_token_usage_sum{namespace=~"$namespace", gen_ai_token_type="input", gen_ai_request_model=~"gemini.*pro.*"}[24h])) or vector(0)) * $gemini_pro_in +
  (sum(increase(agentgateway_gen_ai_client_token_usage_sum{namespace=~"$namespace", gen_ai_token_type="output", gen_ai_request_model=~"gemini.*pro.*"}[24h])) or vector(0)) * $gemini_pro_out +
  (sum(increase(agentgateway_gen_ai_client_token_usage_sum{namespace=~"$namespace", gen_ai_token_type="input", gen_ai_request_model=~"gemini.*flash.*"}[24h])) or vector(0)) * $gemini_flash_in +
  (sum(increase(agentgateway_gen_ai_client_token_usage_sum{namespace=~"$namespace", gen_ai_token_type="output", gen_ai_request_model=~"gemini.*flash.*"}[24h])) or vector(0)) * $gemini_flash_out
) / 1000000

panels.description: Projected monthly cost if current usage rate continues.
panels.title: Projected Monthly

targets.expr:
(
  (sum(rate(agentgateway_gen_ai_client_token_usage_sum{namespace=~"$namespace", gen_ai_token_type="input", gen_ai_request_model=~"gpt-4o"}[24h])) or vector(0)) * $openai_4o_in +
  (sum(rate(agentgateway_gen_ai_client_token_usage_sum{namespace=~"$namespace", gen_ai_token_type="output", gen_ai_request_model=~"gpt-4o"}[24h])) or vector(0)) * $openai_4o_out +
  (sum(rate(agentgateway_gen_ai_client_token_usage_sum{namespace=~"$namespace", gen_ai_token_type="input", gen_ai_request_model=~"gpt-4o-mini"}[24h])) or vector(0)) * $openai_mini_in +
  (sum(rate(agentgateway_gen_ai_client_token_usage_sum{namespace=~"$namespace", gen_ai_token_type="output", gen_ai_request_model=~"gpt-4o-mini"}[24h])) or vector(0)) * $openai_mini_out +
  (sum(rate(agentgateway_gen_ai_client_token_usage_sum{namespace=~"$namespace", gen_ai_token_type="input", gen_ai_request_model=~"o1.*"}[24h])) or vector(0)) * $openai_o1_in +
  (sum(rate(agentgateway_gen_ai_client_token_usage_sum{namespace=~"$namespace", gen_ai_token_type="output", gen_ai_request_model=~"o1.*"}[24h])) or vector(0)) * $openai_o1_out +
  (sum(rate(agentgateway_gen_ai_client_token_usage_sum{namespace=~"$namespace", gen_ai_token_type="input", gen_ai_request_model=~"claude.*opus.*"}[24h])) or vector(0)) * $claude_opus_in +
  (sum(rate(agentgateway_gen_ai_client_token_usage_sum{namespace=~"$namespace", gen_ai_token_type="output", gen_ai_request_model=~"claude.*opus.*"}[24h])) or vector(0)) * $claude_opus_out +
  (sum(rate(agentgateway_gen_ai_client_token_usage_sum{namespace=~"$namespace", gen_ai_token_type="input", gen_ai_request_model=~"claude.*sonnet.*"}[24h])) or vector(0)) * $claude_sonnet_in +
  (sum(rate(agentgateway_gen_ai_client_token_usage_sum{namespace=~"$namespace", gen_ai_token_type="output", gen_ai_request_model=~"claude.*sonnet.*"}[24h])) or vector(0)) * $claude_sonnet_out +
  (sum(rate(agentgateway_gen_ai_client_token_usage_sum{namespace=~"$namespace", gen_ai_token_type="input", gen_ai_request_model=~"claude.*haiku.*"}[24h])) or vector(0)) * $claude_haiku_in +
  (sum(rate(agentgateway_gen_ai_client_token_usage_sum{namespace=~"$namespace", gen_ai_token_type="output", gen_ai_request_model=~"claude.*haiku.*"}[24h])) or vector(0)) * $claude_haiku_out +
  (sum(rate(agentgateway_gen_ai_client_token_usage_sum{namespace=~"$namespace", gen_ai_token_type="input", gen_ai_request_model=~"gemini.*pro.*"}[24h])) or vector(0)) * $gemini_pro_in +
  (sum(rate(agentgateway_gen_ai_client_token_usage_sum{namespace=~"$namespace", gen_ai_token_type="output", gen_ai_request_model=~"gemini.*pro.*"}[24h])) or vector(0)) * $gemini_pro_out +
  (sum(rate(agentgateway_gen_ai_client_token_usage_sum{namespace=~"$namespace", gen_ai_token_type="input", gen_ai_request_model=~"gemini.*flash.*"}[24h])) or vector(0)) * $gemini_flash_in +
  (sum(rate(agentgateway_gen_ai_client_token_usage_sum{namespace=~"$namespace", gen_ai_token_type="output", gen_ai_request_model=~"gemini.*flash.*"}[24h])) or vector(0)) * $gemini_flash_out
) / 1000000 * 3600 * 24 * 30

panels.description: Average cost per API request based on token usage and reference pricing. Shows the mean cost across all models.
panels.title: Avg Cost/Request

targets.expr:
(
  (sum(increase(agentgateway_gen_ai_client_token_usage_sum{namespace=~"$namespace", gen_ai_token_type="input"}[1h])) or vector(0)) * 3 +
  (sum(increase(agentgateway_gen_ai_client_token_usage_sum{namespace=~"$namespace", gen_ai_token_type="output"}[1h])) or vector(0)) * 15
) / 1000000 / clamp_min(sum(increase(agentgateway_requests_total{namespace=~"$namespace"}[1h])) or vector(0), 1)

panels.description: Estimated hourly cost breakdown by model based on reference pricing.
panels.title: Cost by Model ($/hour)

targets.expr: ((sum(rate(agentgateway_gen_ai_client_token_usage_sum{namespace=~"$namespace", gen_ai_token_type="input", gen_ai_request_model=~"gpt-4o"}[$__rate_interval])) or vector(0)) * $openai_4o_in + (sum(rate(agentgateway_gen_ai_client_token_usage_sum{namespace=~"$namespace", gen_ai_token_type="output", gen_ai_request_model=~"gpt-4o"}[$__rate_interval])) or vector(0)) * $openai_4o_out) / 1000000 * 3600

((sum(rate(agentgateway_gen_ai_client_token_usage_sum{namespace=~"$namespace", gen_ai_token_type="input", gen_ai_request_model=~"gpt-4o-mini"}[$__rate_interval])) or vector(0)) * $openai_mini_in + (sum(rate(agentgateway_gen_ai_client_token_usage_sum{namespace=~"$namespace", gen_ai_token_type="output", gen_ai_request_model=~"gpt-4o-mini"}[$__rate_interval])) or vector(0)) * $openai_mini_out) / 1000000 * 3600

((sum(rate(agentgateway_gen_ai_client_token_usage_sum{namespace=~"$namespace", gen_ai_token_type="input", gen_ai_request_model=~"o1.*"}[$__rate_interval])) or vector(0)) * $openai_o1_in + (sum(rate(agentgateway_gen_ai_client_token_usage_sum{namespace=~"$namespace", gen_ai_token_type="output", gen_ai_request_model=~"o1.*"}[$__rate_interval])) or vector(0)) * $openai_o1_out) / 1000000 * 3600

((sum(rate(agentgateway_gen_ai_client_token_usage_sum{namespace=~"$namespace", gen_ai_token_type="input", gen_ai_request_model=~"claude.*opus.*"}[$__rate_interval])) or vector(0)) * $claude_opus_in + (sum(rate(agentgateway_gen_ai_client_token_usage_sum{namespace=~"$namespace", gen_ai_token_type="output", gen_ai_request_model=~"claude.*opus.*"}[$__rate_interval])) or vector(0)) * $claude_opus_out) / 1000000 * 3600

((sum(rate(agentgateway_gen_ai_client_token_usage_sum{namespace=~"$namespace", gen_ai_token_type="input", gen_ai_request_model=~"claude.*sonnet.*"}[$__rate_interval])) or vector(0)) * $claude_sonnet_in + (sum(rate(agentgateway_gen_ai_client_token_usage_sum{namespace=~"$namespace", gen_ai_token_type="output", gen_ai_request_model=~"claude.*sonnet.*"}[$__rate_interval])) or vector(0)) * $claude_sonnet_out) / 1000000 * 3600

((sum(rate(agentgateway_gen_ai_client_token_usage_sum{namespace=~"$namespace", gen_ai_token_type="input", gen_ai_request_model=~"claude.*haiku.*"}[$__rate_interval])) or vector(0)) * $claude_haiku_in + (sum(rate(agentgateway_gen_ai_client_token_usage_sum{namespace=~"$namespace", gen_ai_token_type="output", gen_ai_request_model=~"claude.*haiku.*"}[$__rate_interval])) or vector(0)) * $claude_haiku_out) / 1000000 * 3600

((sum(rate(agentgateway_gen_ai_client_token_usage_sum{namespace=~"$namespace", gen_ai_token_type="input", gen_ai_request_model=~"gemini.*pro.*"}[$__rate_interval])) or vector(0)) * $gemini_pro_in + (sum(rate(agentgateway_gen_ai_client_token_usage_sum{namespace=~"$namespace", gen_ai_token_type="output", gen_ai_request_model=~"gemini.*pro.*"}[$__rate_interval])) or vector(0)) * $gemini_pro_out) / 1000000 * 3600

((sum(rate(agentgateway_gen_ai_client_token_usage_sum{namespace=~"$namespace", gen_ai_token_type="input", gen_ai_request_model=~"gemini.*flash.*"}[$__rate_interval])) or vector(0)) * $gemini_flash_in + (sum(rate(agentgateway_gen_ai_client_token_usage_sum{namespace=~"$namespace", gen_ai_token_type="output", gen_ai_request_model=~"gemini.*flash.*"}[$__rate_interval])) or vector(0)) * $gemini_flash_out) / 1000000 * 3600

panels.description: Token consumption rate broken down by LLM model.
panels.title: Token Usage by Model

panels.description: Token usage split by input (prompts) vs output (responses).
panels.title: Token Usage by Type

panels.description: Number of API calls made to each provider. Each request counts as 1, regardless of token usage. Useful for understanding API call volume and rate limiting.
panels.title: Requests by Provider

panels.description: Total tokens (input + output) processed by each provider. Token usage directly correlates to cost - a single request can use anywhere from 100 to 100,000+ tokens depending on prompt and response length.
panels.title: Tokens by Provider

options.content: Compare model performance: latency percentiles, token consumption per request, and input/output ratios to identify cost-efficient models.

panels.description: Response latency percentiles by model. Higher latency models may also be more expensive due to longer processing.
panels.title: Latency by Model (p50/p95/p99)

panels.description: Average tokens consumed per request by model. Higher values indicate more expensive requests.
panels.title: Tokens per Request by Model

targets.expr: sum by (gen_ai_request_model) (rate(agentgateway_gen_ai_client_token_usage_sum{namespace=~"$namespace", gateway=~"$gateway"}[$__rate_interval])) / sum by (gen_ai_request_model) (rate(agentgateway_gen_ai_client_token_usage_count{namespace=~"$namespace", gateway=~"$gateway"}[$__rate_interval]))

panels.description: Ratio of input to output tokens by model. High ratio = verbose prompts with short responses. Low ratio = concise prompts with long responses.
panels.title: Input/Output Ratio by Model

targets.expr: sum by (gen_ai_request_model) (rate(agentgateway_gen_ai_client_token_usage_sum{namespace=~"$namespace", gateway=~"$gateway", gen_ai_token_type="input"}[$__rate_interval])) / clamp_min(sum by (gen_ai_request_model) (rate(agentgateway_gen_ai_client_token_usage_sum{namespace=~"$namespace", gateway=~"$gateway", gen_ai_token_type="output"}[$__rate_interval])), 0.001)

options.content: Attribute token consumption to specific routes and operations to identify high-cost areas.

panels.description: Token consumption by API route. Identifies which routes are consuming the most tokens.
panels.title: Tokens by Route

panels.description: Token consumption by operation type (e.g., chat, completion, embedding).
panels.title: Tokens by Operation

options.content: Analyze token distribution patterns and detect model mismatches between requested and actual models used.

panels.description: Token count distribution percentiles. Shows typical (p50), high (p90), and extreme (p99) token usage per request.
panels.title: Token Size Distribution (Percentiles)

panels.description: Compares requested model vs actual response model. High mismatch may indicate model fallbacks or routing issues.
panels.title: Model Mismatch Analysis

options.content: Track throttled requests and rate limit utilization for cost control.

panels.description: Failed requests (4xx/5xx) with status code and reason. DirectResponse means blocked at gateway, ResponseComplete means backend returned the error.
panels.title: Failed Requests

panels.description: Percentage of rate limit capacity currently in use.
panels.title: Rate Limit Utilization
